cases.root_cause: Search query returned no matching results from the selected provider.

cases.root_cause: Query reformulation did not improve retrieval quality or result count.
cases.recommended_action: Add query rewrite templates and compare before/after retrieval quality.

cases.root_cause: Answer depended on too few unique sources, increasing bias risk.
cases.recommended_action: Pull results from additional domains before synthesis.
